productDisplayName: Fossil Men Black Chronograph Watch CH2601
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel case and a fixed bezel<br>Dial style: Brown dial with glow-in-the-dark markings and three hands<br>Features: A screw to reset time, a date aperture, 3 subdials for date, day and hour display, two push buttons to adjust features like alarm and timer<br>Strap style: Black steel bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly clasp<br>Water-resistant up to 100 m<br>Comes in an authentic Fossil collectible tin<br>Warranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase</p>
